artifacts.title: Example HR Reviews & Ratings
artifacts.raw_text: Overall a solid HR platform, but the onboarding is painful. Cons: setup took weeks, support was slow to respond, and reporting is limited. Pros: contractor payments are easy and the UI is clean.
artifacts.normalized_text: Overall a solid HR platform, but the onboarding is painful. Cons: setup took weeks, support was slow to respond, and reporting is limited. Pros: contractor payments are easy and the UI is clean.

metadata.exa_query: "Example HR" review OR "cons" OR "pros" G2 OR Capterra OR TrustRadius

artifacts.title: Example HR Reviews 2026 - Capterra
artifacts.raw_text: We switched from a legacy suite. The biggest complaint from our team was pricing at renewal and clunky approvals. Great for global payroll though.
artifacts.normalized_text: We switched from a legacy suite. The biggest complaint from our team was pricing at renewal and clunky approvals. Great for global payroll though.
